NKJV.1: Blessed are the undefiled in the way, Who walk in the law of the LORD!
NKJV.2: Blessed are those who keep His testimonies, Who seek Him with the whole heart!
NKJV.3: They also do no iniquity; They walk in His ways.
NKJV.4: You have commanded us To keep Your precepts diligently.
NKJV.5: Oh, that my ways were directed To keep Your statutes!
NKJV.6: Then I would not be ashamed, When I look into all Your commandments.
NKJV.7: I will praise You with uprightness of heart, When I learn Your righteous judgments.
NKJV.8: I will keep Your statutes; Oh, do not forsake me utterly!
NKJV.9: How can a young man cleanse his way? By taking heed according to Your word.
NKJV.10: With my whole heart I have sought You; Oh, let me not wander from Your commandments!
NKJV.11: Your word I have hidden in my heart, That I might not sin against You.
NKJV.12: Blessed are You, O LORD! Teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.13: With my lips I have declared All the judgments of Your mouth.
NKJV.14: I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies, As much as in all riches.
NKJV.15: I will meditate on Your precepts, And contemplate Your ways.
NKJV.16: I will delight myself in Your statutes; I will not forget Your word.
NKJV.17: Deal bountifully with Your servant, That I may live and keep Your word.
NKJV.18: Open my eyes, that I may see Wondrous things from Your law.
NKJV.19: I am a stranger in the earth; Do not hide Your commandments from me.
NKJV.20: My soul breaks with longing For Your judgments at all times.
NKJV.21: You rebuke the proud—the cursed, Who stray from Your commandments.
NKJV.22: Remove from me reproach and contempt, For I have kept Your testimonies.
NKJV.23: Princes also sit and speak against me, But Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
NKJV.24: Your testimonies also are my delight And my counselors.
NKJV.25: My soul clings to the dust;  Revive me according to Your word.
NKJV.26: I have declared my ways, and You answered me;  Teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.27: Make me understand the way of Your precepts; So shall I meditate on Your wonderful works.
NKJV.28: My soul melts from heaviness; Strengthen me according to Your word.
NKJV.29: Remove from me the way of lying, And grant me Your law graciously.
NKJV.30: I have chosen the way of truth; Your judgments I have laid before me.
NKJV.31: I cling to Your testimonies; O LORD, do not put me to shame!
NKJV.32: I will run the course of Your commandments, For You shall enlarge my heart.
NKJV.33: Teach me, O LORD, the way of Your statutes, And I shall keep it to the end.
NKJV.34: Give me understanding, and I shall keep Your law; Indeed, I shall observe it with my whole heart.
NKJV.35: Make me walk in the path of Your commandments, For I delight in it.
NKJV.36: Incline my heart to Your testimonies, And not to covetousness.
NKJV.37: Turn away my eyes from looking at worthless things, And revive me in Your way.
NKJV.38: Establish Your word to Your servant, Who is devoted to fearing You.
NKJV.39: Turn away my reproach which I dread, For Your judgments are good.
NKJV.40: Behold, I long for Your precepts; Revive me in Your righteousness.
NKJV.41: Let Your mercies come also to me, O LORD— Your salvation according to Your word.
NKJV.42: So shall I have an answer for him who reproaches me, For I trust in Your word.
NKJV.43: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth, For I have hoped in Your ordinances.
NKJV.44: So shall I keep Your law continually, Forever and ever.
NKJV.45: And I will walk at liberty, For I seek Your precepts.
NKJV.46: I will speak of Your testimonies also before kings, And will not be ashamed.
NKJV.47: And I will delight myself in Your commandments, Which I love.
NKJV.48: My hands also I will lift up to Your commandments, Which I love, And I will meditate on Your statutes.
NKJV.49: Remember the word to Your servant, Upon which You have caused me to hope.
NKJV.50: This is my comfort in my affliction, For Your word has given me life.
NKJV.51: The proud have me in great derision, Yet I do not turn aside from Your law.
NKJV.52: I remembered Your judgments of old, O LORD, And have comforted myself.
NKJV.53: Indignation has taken hold of me Because of the wicked, who forsake Your law.
NKJV.54: Your statutes have been my songs In the house of my pilgrimage.
NKJV.55: I remember Your name in the night, O LORD, And I keep Your law.
NKJV.56: This has become mine, Because I kept Your precepts.
NKJV.57: You are my portion, O LORD; I have said that I would keep Your words.
NKJV.58: I entreated Your favor with my whole heart; Be merciful to me according to Your word.
NKJV.59: I thought about my ways, And turned my feet to Your testimonies.
NKJV.60: I made haste, and did not delay To keep Your commandments.
NKJV.61: The cords of the wicked have bound me, But I have not forgotten Your law.
NKJV.62: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to You, Because of Your righteous judgments.
NKJV.63: I am a companion of all who fear You, And of those who keep Your precepts.
NKJV.64: The earth, O LORD, is full of Your mercy; Teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.65: You have dealt well with Your servant, O LORD, according to Your word.
NKJV.66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, For I believe Your commandments.
NKJV.67: Before I was afflicted I went astray, But now I keep Your word.
NKJV.68: You are good, and do good; Teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.69: The proud have forged a lie against me, But I will keep Your precepts with my whole heart.
NKJV.70: Their heart is as fat as grease, But I delight in Your law.
NKJV.71: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, That I may learn Your statutes.
NKJV.72: The law of Your mouth is better to me Than thousands of coins of gold and silver.
NKJV.73: Your hands have made me and fashioned me; Give me understanding, that I may learn Your commandments.
NKJV.74: Those who fear You will be glad when they see me, Because I have hoped in Your word.
NKJV.75: I know, O LORD, that Your judgments are right, And that in faithfulness You have afflicted me.
NKJV.76: Let, I pray, Your merciful kindness be for my comfort, According to Your word to Your servant.
NKJV.77: Let Your tender mercies come to me, that I may live; For Your law is my delight.
NKJV.78: Let the proud be ashamed, For they treated me wrongfully with falsehood; But I will meditate on Your precepts.
NKJV.79: Let those who fear You turn to me, Those who know Your testimonies.
NKJV.80: Let my heart be blameless regarding Your statutes, That I may not be ashamed.
NKJV.81: My soul faints for Your salvation, But I hope in Your word.
NKJV.82: My eyes fail from searching Your word, Saying, “When will You comfort me?”
NKJV.83: For I have become like a wineskin in smoke, Yet I do not forget Your statutes.
NKJV.84: How many are the days of Your servant? When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
NKJV.85: The proud have dug pits for me, Which is not according to Your law.
NKJV.86: All Your commandments are faithful; They persecute me wrongfully; Help me!
NKJV.87: They almost made an end of me on earth, But I did not forsake Your precepts.
NKJV.88: Revive me according to Your lovingkindness, So that I may keep the testimony of Your mouth.
NKJV.89: Forever, O LORD, Your word is settled in heaven.
NKJV.90: Your faithfulness endures to all generations; You established the earth, and it abides.
NKJV.91: They continue this day according to Your ordinances, For all are Your servants.
NKJV.92: Unless Your law had been my delight, I would then have perished in my affliction.
NKJV.93: I will never forget Your precepts, For by them You have given me life.
NKJV.94: I am Yours, save me; For I have sought Your precepts.
NKJV.95: The wicked wait for me to destroy me, But I will consider Your testimonies.
NKJV.96: I have seen the consummation of all perfection, But Your commandment is exceedingly broad.
NKJV.97: Oh, how I love Your law! It is my meditation all the day.
NKJV.98: You, through Your commandments, make me wiser than my enemies; For they are ever with me.
NKJV.99: I have more understanding than all my teachers, For Your testimonies are my meditation.
NKJV.100: I understand more than the ancients, Because I keep Your precepts.
NKJV.101: I have restrained my feet from every evil way, That I may keep Your word.
NKJV.102: I have not departed from Your judgments, For You Yourself have taught me.
NKJV.103: How sweet are Your words to my taste, Sweeter than honey to my mouth!
NKJV.104: Through Your precepts I get understanding; Therefore I hate every false way.
NKJV.105: Your word is a lamp to my feet And a light to my path.
NKJV.106: I have sworn and confirmed That I will keep Your righteous judgments.
NKJV.107: I am afflicted very much; Revive me, O LORD, according to Your word.
NKJV.108: Accept, I pray, the freewill offerings of my mouth, O LORD, And teach me Your judgments.
NKJV.109: My life is continually in my hand, Yet I do not forget Your law.
NKJV.110: The wicked have laid a snare for me, Yet I have not strayed from Your precepts.
NKJV.111: Your testimonies I have taken as a heritage forever, For they are the rejoicing of my heart.
NKJV.112: I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes Forever, to the very end.
NKJV.113: I hate the double-minded, But I love Your law.
NKJV.114: You are my hiding place and my shield; I hope in Your word.
NKJV.115: Depart from me, you evildoers, For I will keep the commandments of my God!
NKJV.116: Uphold me according to Your word, that I may live; And do not let me be ashamed of my hope.
NKJV.117: Hold me up, and I shall be safe, And I shall observe Your statutes continually.
NKJV.118: You reject all those who stray from Your statutes, For their deceit is falsehood.
NKJV.119: You put away all the wicked of the earth like dross; Therefore I love Your testimonies.
NKJV.120: My flesh trembles for fear of You, And I am afraid of Your judgments.
NKJV.121: I have done justice and righteousness; Do not leave me to my oppressors.
NKJV.122: Be surety for Your servant for good; Do not let the proud oppress me.
NKJV.123: My eyes fail from seeking Your salvation And Your righteous word.
NKJV.124: Deal with Your servant according to Your mercy, And teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.125: I am Your servant; Give me understanding, That I may know Your testimonies.
NKJV.126: It is time for You to act, O LORD, For they have regarded Your law as void.
NKJV.127: Therefore I love Your commandments More than gold, yes, than fine gold!
NKJV.128: Therefore all Your precepts concerning all things I consider to be right; I hate every false way.
NKJV.129: Your testimonies are wonderful; Therefore my soul keeps them.
NKJV.130: The entrance of Your words gives light;  It gives understanding to the simple.
NKJV.131: I opened my mouth and panted, For I longed for Your commandments.
NKJV.132: Look upon me and be merciful to me, As Your custom is toward those who love Your name.
NKJV.133: Direct my steps by Your word, And let no iniquity have dominion over me.
NKJV.134: Redeem me from the oppression of man, That I may keep Your precepts.
NKJV.135: Make Your face shine upon Your servant, And teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.136: Rivers of water run down from my eyes, Because men do not keep Your law.
NKJV.137: Righteous are You, O LORD, And upright are Your judgments.
NKJV.138: Your testimonies, which You have commanded, Are righteous and very faithful.
NKJV.139: My zeal has consumed me, Because my enemies have forgotten Your words.
NKJV.140: Your word is very pure; Therefore Your servant loves it.
NKJV.141: I am small and despised, Yet I do not forget Your precepts.
NKJV.142: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness, And Your law is truth.
NKJV.143: Trouble and anguish have overtaken me, Yet Your commandments are my delights.
NKJV.144: The righteousness of Your testimonies is everlasting; Give me understanding, and I shall live.
NKJV.145: I cry out with my whole heart; Hear me, O LORD! I will keep Your statutes.
NKJV.146: I cry out to You; Save me, and I will keep Your testimonies.
NKJV.147: I rise before the dawning of the morning, And cry for help; I hope in Your word.
NKJV.148: My eyes are awake through the night watches, That I may meditate on Your word.
NKJV.149: Hear my voice according to Your lovingkindness; O LORD, revive me according to Your justice.
NKJV.150: They draw near who follow after wickedness; They are far from Your law.
NKJV.151: You are near, O LORD, And all Your commandments are truth.
NKJV.152: Concerning Your testimonies, I have known of old that You have founded them forever.
NKJV.153: Consider my affliction and deliver me, For I do not forget Your law.
NKJV.154: Plead my cause and redeem me; Revive me according to Your word.
NKJV.155: Salvation is far from the wicked, For they do not seek Your statutes.
NKJV.156: Great are Your tender mercies, O LORD; Revive me according to Your judgments.
NKJV.157: Many are my persecutors and my enemies, Yet I do not turn from Your testimonies.
NKJV.158: I see the treacherous, and am disgusted, Because they do not keep Your word.
NKJV.159: Consider how I love Your precepts; Revive me, O LORD, according to Your lovingkindness.
NKJV.160: The entirety of Your word is truth, And every one of Your righteous judgments endures forever.
NKJV.161: Princes persecute me without a cause, But my heart stands in awe of Your word.
NKJV.162: I rejoice at Your word As one who finds great treasure.
NKJV.163: I hate and abhor lying, But I love Your law.
NKJV.164: Seven times a day I praise You, Because of Your righteous judgments.
NKJV.165: Great peace have those who love Your law, And nothing causes them to stumble.
NKJV.166: LORD, I hope for Your salvation, And I do Your commandments.
NKJV.167: My soul keeps Your testimonies, And I love them exceedingly.
NKJV.168: I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies, For all my ways are before You.
NKJV.169: Let my cry come before You, O LORD;  Give me understanding according to Your word.
NKJV.170: Let my supplication come before You; Deliver me according to Your word.
NKJV.171: My lips shall utter praise, For You teach me Your statutes.
NKJV.172: My tongue shall speak of Your word, For all Your commandments are righteousness.
NKJV.173: Let Your hand become my help, For I have chosen Your precepts.
NKJV.174: I long for Your salvation, O LORD, And Your law is my delight.
NKJV.175: Let my soul live, and it shall praise You; And let Your judgments help me.
NKJV.176: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; Seek Your servant, For I do not forget Your commandments.

ESV.16: I will delight in your statutes; I will not forget your word.
ESV.17: Deal bountifully with your servant, that I may live and keep your word.
ESV.18: Open my eyes, that I may behold wondrous things out of your law.
ESV.19: I am a sojourner on the earth; hide not your commandments from me!
ESV.20: My soul is consumed with longing for your rules  at all times.
ESV.21: You rebuke the insolent, accursed ones, who wander from your commandments.
ESV.22: Take away from me scorn and contempt, for I have kept your testimonies.
ESV.23: Even though princes sit plotting against me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.
ESV.24: Your testimonies are my delight; they are my counselors.
ESV.25: My soul clings to the dust; give me life according to your word!
ESV.26: When I told of my ways, you answered me; teach me your statutes!
ESV.27: Make me understand the way of your precepts, and I will meditate on your wondrous works.
ESV.28: My soul melts away for sorrow; strengthen me according to your word!
ESV.29: Put false ways far from me and graciously teach me your law!
ESV.30: I have chosen the way of faithfulness; I set your rules before me.
ESV.31: I cling to your testimonies, O LORD; let me not be put to shame!
ESV.32: I will run in the way of your commandments when you enlarge my heart!
ESV.33: Teach me, O LORD, the way of your statutes; and I will keep it to the end.
ESV.34: Give me understanding, that I may keep your law and observe it with my whole heart.
ESV.35: Lead me in the path of your commandments, for I delight in it.
ESV.36: Incline my heart to your testimonies, and not to selfish gain!
ESV.37: Turn my eyes from looking at worthless things; and give me life in your ways.
ESV.38: Confirm to your servant your promise, that you may be feared.
ESV.39: Turn away the reproach that I dread, for your rules are good.
ESV.40: Behold, I long for your precepts; in your righteousness give me life!
ESV.41: Let your steadfast love come to me, O LORD, your salvation according to your promise;
ESV.42: then shall I have an answer for him who taunts me, for I trust in your word.
ESV.43: And take not the word of truth utterly out of my mouth, for my hope is in your rules.
ESV.44: I will keep your law continually, forever and ever,
ESV.45: and I shall walk in a wide place, for I have sought your precepts.
ESV.46: I will also speak of your testimonies before kings and shall not be put to shame,
ESV.47: for I find my delight in your commandments, which I love.
ESV.48: I will lift up my hands toward your commandments, which I love, and I will meditate on your statutes.
ESV.49: Remember your word to your servant, in which you have made me hope.
ESV.50: This is my comfort in my affliction, that your promise gives me life.
ESV.51: The insolent utterly deride me, but I do not turn away from your law.
ESV.52: When I think of your rules from of old, I take comfort, O LORD.
ESV.53: Hot indignation seizes me because of the wicked, who forsake your law.
ESV.54: Your statutes have been my songs in the house of my sojourning.
ESV.55: I remember your name in the night, O LORD, and keep your law.
ESV.56: This blessing has fallen to me, that I have kept your precepts.
ESV.57: The LORD is my portion; I promise to keep your words.
ESV.58: I entreat your favor with all my heart; be gracious to me according to your promise.
ESV.59: When I think on my ways, I turn my feet to your testimonies;
ESV.60: I hasten and do not delay to keep your commandments.
ESV.61: Though the cords of the wicked ensnare me, I do not forget your law.
ESV.62: At midnight I rise to praise you, because of your righteous rules.
ESV.63: I am a companion of all who fear you, of those who keep your precepts.
ESV.64: The earth, O LORD, is full of your steadfast love; teach me your statutes!
ESV.65: You have dealt well with your servant, O LORD, according to your word.
ESV.66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in your commandments.
ESV.67: Before I was afflicted I went astray, but now I keep your word.
ESV.68: You are good and do good; teach me your statutes.
ESV.69: The insolent smear me with lies, but with my whole heart I keep your precepts;
ESV.70: their heart is unfeeling like fat, but I delight in your law.
ESV.71: It is good for me that I was afflicted, that I might learn your statutes.
ESV.72: The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of gold and silver pieces.
ESV.73: Your hands have made and fashioned me; give me understanding that I may learn your commandments.
ESV.74: Those who fear you shall see me and rejoice, because I have hoped in your word.
ESV.75: I know, O LORD, that your rules are righteous, and that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.
ESV.76: Let your steadfast love comfort me according to your promise to your servant.
ESV.77: Let your mercy come to me, that I may live; for your law is my delight.
ESV.78: Let the insolent be put to shame, because they have wronged me with falsehood; as for me, I will meditate on your precepts.
ESV.79: Let those who fear you turn to me, that they may know your testimonies.
ESV.80: May my heart be blameless in your statutes, that I may not be put to shame!
ESV.81: My soul longs for your salvation; I hope in your word.
ESV.82: My eyes long for your promise; I ask, “When will you comfort me?”
ESV.83: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke, yet I have not forgotten your statutes.
ESV.84: How long must your servant endure?  When will you judge those who persecute me?
ESV.85: The insolent have dug pitfalls for me; they do not live according to your law.
ESV.86: All your commandments are sure; they persecute me with falsehood; help me!
ESV.87: They have almost made an end of me on earth, but I have not forsaken your precepts.
ESV.88: In your steadfast love give me life, that I may keep the testimonies of your mouth.
ESV.89: Forever, O LORD, your word is firmly fixed in the heavens.
ESV.90: Your faithfulness endures to all generations; you have established the earth, and it stands fast.
ESV.91: By your appointment they stand this day, for all things are your servants.
ESV.92: If your law had not been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.
ESV.93: I will never forget your precepts, for by them you have given me life.
ESV.94: I am yours; save me, for I have sought your precepts.
ESV.95: The wicked lie in wait to destroy me, but I consider your testimonies.
ESV.96: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but your commandment is exceedingly broad.
ESV.97: Oh how I love your law! It is my meditation all the day.
ESV.98: Your commandment makes me wiser than my enemies, for it is ever with me.
ESV.99: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for your testimonies are my meditation.
ESV.100: I understand more than the aged,  for I keep your precepts.
ESV.101: I hold back my feet from every evil way, in order to keep your word.
ESV.102: I do not turn aside from your rules, for you have taught me.
ESV.103: How sweet are your words to my taste, sweeter than honey to my mouth!
ESV.104: Through your precepts I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way.
ESV.105: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.
ESV.106: I have sworn an oath and confirmed it, to keep your righteous rules.
ESV.107: I am severely afflicted; give me life, O LORD, according to your word!
ESV.108: Accept my freewill offerings of praise, O LORD, and teach me your rules.
ESV.109: I hold my life in my hand continually, but I do not forget your law.
ESV.110: The wicked have laid a snare for me, but I do not stray from your precepts.
ESV.111: Your testimonies are my heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.
ESV.112: I incline my heart to perform your statutes forever, to the end.
ESV.113: I hate the double-minded, but I love your law.
ESV.114: You are my hiding place and my shield; I hope in your word.
ESV.115: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may keep the commandments of my God.
ESV.116: Uphold me according to your promise, that I may live, and let me not be put to shame in my hope!
ESV.117: Hold me up, that I may be safe and have regard for your statutes continually!
ESV.118: You spurn all who go astray from your statutes, for their cunning is in vain.
ESV.119: All the wicked of the earth you discard like dross, therefore I love your testimonies.
ESV.120: My flesh trembles for fear of you, and I am afraid of your judgments.
ESV.121: I have done what is just and right; do not leave me to my oppressors.
ESV.122: Give your servant a pledge of good; let not the insolent oppress me.
ESV.123: My eyes long for your salvation and for the fulfillment of your righteous promise.
ESV.124: Deal with your servant according to your steadfast love, and teach me your statutes.
ESV.125: I am your servant; give me understanding, that I may know your testimonies!
ESV.126: It is time for the LORD to act, for your law has been broken.
ESV.127: Therefore I love your commandments above gold, above fine gold.
ESV.128: Therefore I consider all your precepts to be right; I hate every false way.
ESV.129: Your testimonies are wonderful; therefore my soul keeps them.
ESV.130: The unfolding of your words gives light; it imparts understanding to the simple.
ESV.131: I open my mouth and pant, because I long for your commandments.
ESV.132: Turn to me and be gracious to me, as is your way with those who love your name.
ESV.133: Keep steady my steps according to your promise, and let no iniquity get dominion over me.
ESV.134: Redeem me from man's oppression, that I may keep your precepts.
ESV.135: Make your face shine upon your servant, and teach me your statutes.
ESV.136: My eyes shed streams of tears, because people do not keep your law.
ESV.137: Righteous are you, O LORD, and right are your rules.
ESV.138: You have appointed your testimonies in righteousness and in all faithfulness.
ESV.139: My zeal consumes me, because my foes forget your words.
ESV.140: Your promise is well tried, and your servant loves it.
ESV.141: I am small and despised, yet I do not forget your precepts.
ESV.142: Your righteousness is righteous forever, and your law is true.
ESV.143: Trouble and anguish have found me out, but your commandments are my delight.
ESV.144: Your testimonies are righteous forever; give me understanding that I may live.
ESV.145: With my whole heart I cry; answer me, O LORD! I will keep your statutes.
ESV.146: I call to you; save me, that I may observe your testimonies.
ESV.147: I rise before dawn and cry for help; I hope in your words.
ESV.148: My eyes are awake before the watches of the night, that I may meditate on your promise.
ESV.149: Hear my voice according to your steadfast love; O LORD, according to your justice give me life.
ESV.150: They draw near who persecute me with evil purpose; they are far from your law.
ESV.151: But you are near, O LORD, and all your commandments are true.
ESV.152: Long have I known from your testimonies that you have founded them forever.
ESV.153: Look on my affliction and deliver me, for I do not forget your law.
ESV.154: Plead my cause and redeem me; give me life according to your promise!
ESV.155: Salvation is far from the wicked, for they do not seek your statutes.
ESV.156: Great is your mercy, O LORD; give me life according to your rules.
ESV.157: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries, but I do not swerve from your testimonies.
ESV.158: I look at the faithless with disgust, because they do not keep your commands.
ESV.159: Consider how I love your precepts! Give me life according to your steadfast love.
ESV.160: The sum of your word is truth, and every one of your righteous rules endures forever.
ESV.161: Princes persecute me without cause, but my heart stands in awe of your words.
ESV.162: I rejoice at your word like one who finds great spoil.
ESV.163: I hate and abhor falsehood, but I love your law.
ESV.164: Seven times a day I praise you for your righteous rules.
ESV.165: Great peace have those who love your law; nothing can make them stumble.
ESV.166: I hope for your salvation, O LORD, and I do your commandments.
ESV.167: My soul keeps your testimonies; I love them exceedingly.
ESV.168: I keep your precepts and testimonies, for all my ways are before you.
ESV.169: Let my cry come before you, O LORD; give me understanding according to your word!
ESV.170: Let my plea come before you; deliver me according to your word.
ESV.171: My lips will pour forth praise, for you teach me your statutes.
ESV.172: My tongue will sing of your word, for all your commandments are right.
ESV.173: Let your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen your precepts.
ESV.174: I long for your salvation, O LORD, and your law is my delight.
ESV.175: Let my soul live and praise you, and let your rules help me.
ESV.176: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek your servant, for I do not forget your commandments.

NASB.172: Let my tongue sing of Your word, For all Your commandments are righteousness.
NASB.173: Let Your hand be ready to help me, For I have chosen Your precepts.
NASB.174: I long for Your salvation, O LORD, And Your law is my delight.
NASB.175: Let my soul live that it may praise You, And let Your ordinances help me.
NASB.176: I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek Your servant, For I do not forget Your commandments.

NLT.1:
Joyful are people of integrity,
who follow the instructions of the LORD.
NLT.2:
Joyful are those who obey his laws
and search for him with all their hearts.
NLT.3:
They do not compromise with evil,
and they walk only in his paths.
NLT.4:
You have charged us
to keep your commandments carefully.
NLT.5:
Oh, that my actions would consistently
reflect your decrees!
NLT.6:
Then I will not be ashamed
when I compare my life with your commands.
NLT.7:
As I learn your righteous regulations,
I will thank you by living as I should!
NLT.8:
I will obey your decrees.
Please don’t give up on me!
NLT.9:
How can a young person stay pure?
By obeying your word.
NLT.10:
I have tried hard to find you —
don’t let me wander from your commands.
NLT.11:
I have hidden your word in my heart,
that I might not sin against you.
NLT.12:
I praise you, O LORD;
teach me your decrees.
NLT.13:
I have recited aloud
all the regulations you have given us.
NLT.14:
I have rejoiced in your laws
as much as in riches.
NLT.15:
I will study your commandments
and reflect on your ways.
NLT.16:
I will delight in your decrees
and not forget your word.
NLT.17:
Be good to your servant,
that I may live and obey your word.
NLT.18:
Open my eyes to see
the wonderful truths in your instructions.
NLT.19:
I am only a foreigner in the land.
Don’t hide your commands from me!
NLT.20:
I am always overwhelmed
with a desire for your regulations.
NLT.21:
You rebuke the arrogant;
those who wander from your commands are cursed.
NLT.22:
Don’t let them scorn and insult me,
for I have obeyed your laws.
NLT.23:
Even princes sit and speak against me,
but I will meditate on your decrees.
NLT.24:
Your laws please me;
they give me wise advice.
NLT.25:
I lie in the dust;
revive me by your word.
NLT.26:
I told you my plans, and you answered.
Now teach me your decrees.
NLT.27:
Help me understand the meaning of your commandments,
and I will meditate on your wonderful deeds.
NLT.28:
I weep with sorrow;
encourage me by your word.
NLT.29:
Keep me from lying to myself;
give me the privilege of knowing your instructions.
NLT.30:
I have chosen to be faithful;
I have determined to live by your regulations.
NLT.31:
I cling to your laws.
LORD, don’t let me be put to shame!
NLT.32:
I will pursue your commands,
for you expand my understanding.
NLT.33:
Teach me your decrees, O LORD;
I will keep them to the end.
NLT.34:
Give me understanding and I will obey your instructions;
I will put them into practice with all my heart.
NLT.35:
Make me walk along the path of your commands,
for that is where my happiness is found.
NLT.36:
Give me an eagerness for your laws
rather than a love for money!
NLT.37:
Turn my eyes from worthless things,
and give me life through your word.
NLT.38:
Reassure me of your promise,
made to those who fear you.
NLT.39:
Help me abandon my shameful ways;
for your regulations are good.
NLT.40:
I long to obey your commandments!
Renew my life with your goodness.
NLT.41:
LORD, give me your unfailing love,
the salvation that you promised me.
NLT.42:
Then I can answer those who taunt me,
for I trust in your word.
NLT.43:
Do not snatch your word of truth from me,
for your regulations are my only hope.
NLT.44:
I will keep on obeying your instructions
forever and ever.
NLT.45:
I will walk in freedom,
for I have devoted myself to your commandments.
NLT.46:
I will speak to kings about your laws,
and I will not be ashamed.
NLT.47:
How I delight in your commands!
How I love them!
NLT.48:
I honor and love your commands.
I meditate on your decrees.
NLT.49:
Remember your promise to me;
it is my only hope.
NLT.50:
Your promise revives me;
it comforts me in all my troubles.
NLT.51:
The proud hold me in utter contempt,
but I do not turn away from your instructions.
NLT.52:
I meditate on your age-old regulations;
O LORD, they comfort me.
NLT.53:
I become furious with the wicked,
because they reject your instructions.
NLT.54:
Your decrees have been the theme of my songs
wherever I have lived.
NLT.55:
I reflect at night on who you are, O LORD;
therefore, I obey your instructions.
NLT.56:
This is how I spend my life:
obeying your commandments.
NLT.57:
LORD, you are mine!
I promise to obey your words!
NLT.58:
With all my heart I want your blessings.
Be merciful as you promised.
NLT.59:
I pondered the direction of my life,
and I turned to follow your laws.
NLT.60:
I will hurry, without delay,
to obey your commands.
NLT.61:
Evil people try to drag me into sin,
but I am firmly anchored to your instructions.
NLT.62:
I rise at midnight to thank you
for your just regulations.
NLT.63:
I am a friend to anyone who fears you —
anyone who obeys your commandments.
NLT.64:
O LORD, your unfailing love fills the earth;
teach me your decrees.
NLT.65:
You have done many good things for me, LORD,
just as you promised.
NLT.66:
I believe in your commands;
now teach me good judgment and knowledge.
NLT.67:
I used to wander off until you disciplined me;
but now I closely follow your word.
NLT.68:
You are good and do only good;
teach me your decrees.
NLT.69:
Arrogant people smear me with lies,
but in truth I obey your commandments with all my heart.
NLT.70:
Their hearts are dull and stupid,
but I delight in your instructions.
NLT.71:
My suffering was good for me,
for it taught me to pay attention to your decrees.
NLT.72:
Your instructions are more valuable to me
than millions in gold and silver.
NLT.73:
You made me; you created me.
Now give me the sense to follow your commands.
NLT.74:
May all who fear you find in me a cause for joy,
for I have put my hope in your word.
NLT.75:
I know, O LORD, that your regulations are fair;
you disciplined me because I needed it.
NLT.76:
Now let your unfailing love comfort me,
just as you promised me, your servant.
NLT.77:
Surround me with your tender mercies so I may live,
for your instructions are my delight.
NLT.78:
Bring disgrace upon the arrogant people who lied about me;
meanwhile, I will concentrate on your commandments.
NLT.79:
Let me be united with all who fear you,
with those who know your laws.
NLT.80:
May I be blameless in keeping your decrees;
then I will never be ashamed.
NLT.81:
I am worn out waiting for your rescue,
but I have put my hope in your word.
NLT.82:
My eyes are straining to see your promises come true.
When will you comfort me?
NLT.83:
I am shriveled like a wineskin in the smoke,
but I have not forgotten to obey your decrees.
NLT.84:
How long must I wait?
When will you punish those who persecute me?
NLT.85:
These arrogant people who hate your instructions
have dug deep pits to trap me.
NLT.86:
All your commands are trustworthy.
Protect me from those who hunt me down without cause.
NLT.87:
They almost finished me off,
but I refused to abandon your commandments.
NLT.88:
In your unfailing love, spare my life;
then I can continue to obey your laws.
NLT.89:
Your eternal word, O LORD,
stands firm in heaven.
NLT.90:
Your faithfulness extends to every generation,
as enduring as the earth you created.
NLT.91:
Your regulations remain true to this day,
for everything serves your plans.
NLT.92:
If your instructions hadn’t sustained me with joy,
I would have died in my misery.
NLT.93:
I will never forget your commandments,
for by them you give me life.
NLT.94:
I am yours; rescue me!
For I have worked hard at obeying your commandments.
NLT.95:
Though the wicked hide along the way to kill me,
I will quietly keep my mind on your laws.
NLT.96:
Even perfection has its limits,
but your commands have no limit.
NLT.97:
Oh, how I love your instructions!
I think about them all day long.
NLT.98:
Your commands make me wiser than my enemies,
for they are my constant guide.
NLT.99:
Yes, I have more insight than my teachers,
for I am always thinking of your laws.
NLT.100:
I am even wiser than my elders,
for I have kept your commandments.
NLT.101:
I have refused to walk on any evil path,
so that I may remain obedient to your word.
NLT.102:
I haven’t turned away from your regulations,
for you have taught me well.
NLT.103:
How sweet your words taste to me;
they are sweeter than honey.
NLT.104:
Your commandments give me understanding;
no wonder I hate every false way of life.
NLT.105:
Your word is a lamp to guide my feet
and a light for my path.
NLT.106:
I’ve promised it once, and I’ll promise it again:
I will obey your righteous regulations.
NLT.107:
I have suffered much, O LORD;
restore my life again as you promised.
NLT.108:
LORD, accept my offering of praise,
and teach me your regulations.
NLT.109:
My life constantly hangs in the balance,
but I will not stop obeying your instructions.
NLT.110:
The wicked have set their traps for me,
but I will not turn from your commandments.
NLT.111:
Your laws are my treasure;
they are my heart’s delight.
NLT.112:
I am determined to keep your decrees
to the very end.
NLT.113:
I hate those with divided loyalties,
but I love your instructions.
NLT.114:
You are my refuge and my shield;
your word is my source of hope.
NLT.115:
Get out of my life, you evil-minded people,
for I intend to obey the commands of my God.
NLT.116:
LORD, sustain me as you promised, that I may live!
Do not let my hope be crushed.
NLT.117:
Sustain me, and I will be rescued;
then I will meditate continually on your decrees.
NLT.118:
But you have rejected all who stray from your decrees.
They are only fooling themselves.
NLT.119:
You skim off the wicked of the earth like scum;
no wonder I love to obey your laws!
NLT.120:
I tremble in fear of you;
I stand in awe of your regulations.
NLT.121:
Don’t leave me to the mercy of my enemies,
for I have done what is just and right.
NLT.122:
Please guarantee a blessing for me.
Don’t let the arrogant oppress me!
NLT.123:
My eyes strain to see your rescue,
to see the truth of your promise fulfilled.
NLT.124:
I am your servant; deal with me in unfailing love,
and teach me your decrees.
NLT.125:
Give discernment to me, your servant;
then I will understand your laws.
NLT.126:
LORD, it is time for you to act,
for these evil people have violated your instructions.
NLT.127:
Truly, I love your commands
more than gold, even the finest gold.
NLT.128:
Each of your commandments is right.
That is why I hate every false way.
NLT.129:
Your laws are wonderful.
No wonder I obey them!
NLT.130:
The teaching of your word gives light,
so even the simple can understand.
NLT.131:
I pant with expectation,
longing for your commands.
NLT.132:
Come and show me your mercy,
as you do for all who love your name.
NLT.133:
Guide my steps by your word,
so I will not be overcome by evil.
NLT.134:
Ransom me from the oppression of evil people;
then I can obey your commandments.
NLT.135:
Look upon me with love;
teach me your decrees.
NLT.136:
Rivers of tears gush from my eyes
because people disobey your instructions.
NLT.137:
O LORD, you are righteous,
and your regulations are fair.
NLT.138:
Your laws are perfect
and completely trustworthy.
NLT.139:
I am overwhelmed with indignation,
for my enemies have disregarded your words.
NLT.140:
Your promises have been thoroughly tested;
that is why I love them so much.
NLT.141:
I am insignificant and despised,
but I don’t forget your commandments.
NLT.142:
Your justice is eternal,
and your instructions are perfectly true.
NLT.143:
As pressure and stress bear down on me,
I find joy in your commands.
NLT.144:
Your laws are always right;
help me to understand them so I may live.
NLT.145:
I pray with all my heart; answer me, LORD!
I will obey your decrees.
NLT.146:
I cry out to you; rescue me,
that I may obey your laws.
NLT.147:
I rise early, before the sun is up;
I cry out for help and put my hope in your words.
NLT.148:
I stay awake through the night,
thinking about your promise.
NLT.149:
In your faithful love, O LORD, hear my cry;
let me be revived by following your regulations.
NLT.150:
Lawless people are coming to attack me;
they live far from your instructions.
NLT.151:
But you are near, O LORD,
and all your commands are true.
NLT.152:
I have known from my earliest days
that your laws will last forever.
NLT.153:
Look upon my suffering and rescue me,
for I have not forgotten your instructions.
NLT.154:
Argue my case; take my side!
Protect my life as you promised.
NLT.155:
The wicked are far from rescue,
for they do not bother with your decrees.
NLT.156:
LORD, how great is your mercy;
let me be revived by following your regulations.
NLT.157:
Many persecute and trouble me,
yet I have not swerved from your laws.
NLT.158:
Seeing these traitors makes me sick at heart,
because they care nothing for your word.
NLT.159:
See how I love your commandments, LORD.
Give back my life because of your unfailing love.
NLT.160:
The very essence of your words is truth;
all your just regulations will stand forever.
NLT.161:
Powerful people harass me without cause,
but my heart trembles only at your word.
NLT.162:
I rejoice in your word
like one who discovers a great treasure.
NLT.163:
I hate and abhor all falsehood,
but I love your instructions.
NLT.164:
I will praise you seven times a day
because all your regulations are just.
NLT.165:
Those who love your instructions have great peace
and do not stumble.
NLT.166:
I long for your rescue, LORD,
so I have obeyed your commands.
NLT.167:
I have obeyed your laws,
for I love them very much.
NLT.168:
Yes, I obey your commandments and laws
because you know everything I do.
NLT.169:
O LORD, listen to my cry;
give me the discerning mind you promised.
NLT.170:
Listen to my prayer;
rescue me as you promised.
NLT.171:
Let praise flow from my lips,
for you have taught me your decrees.
NLT.172:
Let my tongue sing about your word,
for all your commands are right.
NLT.173:
Give me a helping hand,
for I have chosen to follow your commandments.
NLT.174:
O LORD, I have longed for your rescue,
and your instructions are my delight.
NLT.175:
Let me live so I can praise you,
and may your regulations help me.
NLT.176:
I have wandered away like a lost sheep;
come and find me,
for I have not forgotten your commands.

WEB.1: ALEPH Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to Yahweh’s law.
WEB.2: Blessed are those who keep his statutes, who seek him with their whole heart.
WEB.3: Yes, they do nothing wrong. They walk in his ways.
WEB.4: You have commanded your precepts, that we should fully obey them.
WEB.5: Oh that my ways were steadfast to obey your statutes!
WEB.6: Then I wouldn’t be disappointed, when I consider all of your commandments.
WEB.7: I will give thanks to you with uprightness of heart, when I learn your righteous judgments.
WEB.8: I will observe your statutes. Don’t utterly forsake me. BET
WEB.9: How can a young man keep his way pure? By living according to your word.
WEB.10: With my whole heart, I have sought you. Don’t let me wander from your commandments.
WEB.11: I have hidden your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you.
WEB.12: Blessed are you, Yahweh. Teach me your statutes.
WEB.13: With my lips, I have declared all the ordinances of your mouth.
WEB.14: I have rejoiced in the way of your testimonies, as much as in all riches.
WEB.15: I will meditate on your precepts, and consider your ways.
WEB.16: I will delight myself in your statutes. I will not forget your word. GIMEL
WEB.17: Do good to your servant. I will live and I will obey your word.
WEB.18: Open my eyes, that I may see wondrous things out of your law.
WEB.19: I am a stranger on the earth. Don’t hide your commandments from me.
WEB.20: My soul is consumed with longing for your ordinances at all times.
WEB.21: You have rebuked the proud who are cursed, who wander from your commandments.
WEB.22: Take reproach and contempt away from me, for I have kept your statutes.
WEB.23: Though princes sit and slander me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.
WEB.24: Indeed your statutes are my delight, and my counselors. DALED
WEB.25: My soul is laid low in the dust. Revive me according to your word!
WEB.26: I declared my ways, and you answered me. Teach me your statutes.
WEB.27: Let me understand the teaching of your precepts! Then I will meditate on your wondrous works.
WEB.28: My soul is weary with sorrow: strengthen me according to your word.
WEB.29: Keep me from the way of deceit. Grant me your law graciously!
WEB.30: I have chosen the way of truth. I have set your ordinances before me.
WEB.31: I cling to your statutes, Yahweh. Don’t let me be disappointed.
WEB.32: I run in the path of your commandments, for you have set my heart free. HEY
WEB.33: Teach me, Yahweh, the way of your statutes. I will keep them to the end.
WEB.34: Give me understanding, and I will keep your law. Yes, I will obey it with my whole heart.
WEB.35: Direct me in the path of your commandments, for I delight in them.
WEB.36: Turn my heart toward your statutes, not toward selfish gain.
WEB.37: Turn my eyes away from looking at worthless things. Revive me in your ways.
WEB.38: Fulfill your promise to your servant, that you may be feared.
WEB.39: Take away my disgrace that I dread, for your ordinances are good.
WEB.40: Behold, I long for your precepts! Revive me in your righteousness. WAW
WEB.41: Let your loving kindness also come to me, Yahweh, your salvation, according to your word.
WEB.42: So I will have an answer for him who reproaches me, for I trust in your word.
WEB.43: Don’t snatch the word of truth out of my mouth, for I put my hope in your ordinances.
WEB.44: So I will obey your law continually, forever and ever.
WEB.45: I will walk in liberty, for I have sought your precepts.
WEB.46: I will also speak of your statutes before kings, and will not be disappointed.
WEB.47: I will delight myself in your commandments, because I love them.
WEB.48: I reach out my hands for your commandments, which I love. I will meditate on your statutes. ZAYIN
WEB.49: Remember your word to your servant, because you gave me hope.
WEB.50: This is my comfort in my affliction, for your word has revived me.
WEB.51: The arrogant mock me excessively, but I don’t swerve from your law.
WEB.52: I remember your ordinances of old, Yahweh, and have comforted myself.
WEB.53: Indignation has taken hold on me, because of the wicked who forsake your law.
WEB.54: Your statutes have been my songs, in the house where I live.
WEB.55: I have remembered your name, Yahweh, in the night, and I obey your law.
WEB.56: This is my way, that I keep your precepts. CHET
WEB.57: Yahweh is my portion. I promised to obey your words.
WEB.58: I sought your favor with my whole heart. Be merciful to me according to your word.
WEB.59: I considered my ways, and turned my steps to your statutes.
WEB.60: I will hurry, and not delay, to obey your commandments.
WEB.61: The ropes of the wicked bind me, but I won’t forget your law.
WEB.62: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to you, because of your righteous ordinances.
WEB.63: I am a friend of all those who fear you, of those who observe your precepts.
WEB.64: The earth is full of your loving kindness, Yahweh. Teach me your statutes. TET
WEB.65: Do good to your servant, according to your word, Yahweh.
WEB.66: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in your commandments.
WEB.67: Before I was afflicted, I went astray; but now I observe your word.
WEB.68: You are good, and do good. Teach me your statutes.
WEB.69: The proud have smeared a lie upon me. With my whole heart, I will keep your precepts.
WEB.70: Their heart is as callous as the fat, but I delight in your law.
WEB.71: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, that I may learn your statutes.
WEB.72: The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver. YUD
WEB.73: Your hands have made me and formed me. Give me understanding, that I may learn your commandments.
WEB.74: Those who fear you will see me and be glad, because I have put my hope in your word.
WEB.75: Yahweh, I know that your judgments are righteous, that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.
WEB.76: Please let your loving kindness be for my comfort, according to your word to your servant.
WEB.77: Let your tender mercies come to me, that I may live; for your law is my delight.
WEB.78: Let the proud be disappointed, for they have overthrown me wrongfully. I will meditate on your precepts.
WEB.79: Let those who fear you turn to me. They will know your statutes.
WEB.80: Let my heart be blameless toward your decrees, that I may not be disappointed. KAF
WEB.81: My soul faints for your salvation. I hope in your word.
WEB.82: My eyes fail for your word. I say, “When will you comfort me?”
WEB.83: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke. I don’t forget your statutes.
WEB.84: How many are the days of your servant? When will you execute judgment on those who persecute me?
WEB.85: The proud have dug pits for me, contrary to your law.
WEB.86: All of your commandments are faithful. They persecute me wrongfully. Help me!
WEB.87: They had almost wiped me from the earth, but I didn’t forsake your precepts.
WEB.88: Preserve my life according to your loving kindness, so I will obey the statutes of your mouth. LAMED
WEB.89: Yahweh, your word is settled in heaven forever.
WEB.90: Your faithfulness is to all generations. You have established the earth, and it remains.
WEB.91: Your laws remain to this day, for all things serve you.
WEB.92: Unless your law had been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.
WEB.93: I will never forget your precepts, for with them, you have revived me.
WEB.94: I am yours. Save me, for I have sought your precepts.
WEB.95: The wicked have waited for me, to destroy me. I will consider your statutes.
WEB.96: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but your commands are boundless. MEM
WEB.97: How I love your law! It is my meditation all day.
WEB.98: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for your commandments are always with me.
WEB.99: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for your testimonies are my meditation.
WEB.100: I understand more than the aged, because I have kept your precepts.
WEB.101: I have kept my feet from every evil way, that I might observe your word.
WEB.102: I have not turned aside from your ordinances, for you have taught me.
WEB.103: How sweet are your promises to my taste, more than honey to my mouth!
WEB.104: Through your precepts, I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way. NUN
WEB.105: Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.
WEB.106: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, that I will obey your righteous ordinances.
WEB.107: I am afflicted very much. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your word.
WEB.108: Accept, I beg you, the willing offerings of my mouth. Yahweh, teach me your ordinances.
WEB.109: My soul is continually in my hand, yet I won’t forget your law.
WEB.110: The wicked have laid a snare for me, yet I haven’t gone astray from your precepts.
WEB.111: I have taken your testimonies as a heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.
WEB.112: I have set my heart to perform your statutes forever, even to the end. SAMEKH
WEB.113: I hate double-minded men, but I love your law.
WEB.114: You are my hiding place and my shield. I hope in your word.
WEB.115: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may keep the commandments of my God.
WEB.116: Uphold me according to your word, that I may live. Let me not be ashamed of my hope.
WEB.117: Hold me up, and I will be safe, and will have respect for your statutes continually.
WEB.118: You reject all those who stray from your statutes, for their deceit is in vain.
WEB.119: You put away all the wicked of the earth like dross. Therefore I love your testimonies.
WEB.120: My flesh trembles for fear of you. I am afraid of your judgments. AYIN
WEB.121: I have done what is just and righteous. Don’t leave me to my oppressors.
WEB.122: Ensure your servant’s well-being. Don’t let the proud oppress me.
WEB.123: My eyes fail looking for your salvation, for your righteous word.
WEB.124: Deal with your servant according to your loving kindness. Teach me your statutes.
WEB.125: I am your servant. Give me understanding, that I may know your testimonies.
WEB.126: It is time to act, Yahweh, for they break your law.
WEB.127: Therefore I love your commandments more than gold, yes, more than pure gold.
WEB.128: Therefore I consider all of your precepts to be right. I hate every false way. PEY
WEB.129: Your testimonies are wonderful, therefore my soul keeps them.
WEB.130: The entrance of your words gives light. It gives understanding to the simple.
WEB.131: I opened my mouth wide and panted, for I longed for your commandments.
