AMP.1:
Aleph. How blessed and favored by God are those whose way is blameless [those with personal integrity, the upright, the guileless],
Who walk in the law [and who are guided by the precepts and revealed will] of the LORD.
AMP.2:
Blessed and favored by God are those who keep His testimonies,
And who [consistently] seek Him and long for Him with all their heart.
AMP.3:
They do no unrighteousness;
They walk in His ways.
AMP.4:
You have ordained Your precepts,
That we should follow them with [careful] diligence.
AMP.5:
Oh, that my ways may be established
To observe and keep Your statutes [obediently accepting and honoring them]!
AMP.6:
Then I will not be ashamed
When I look [with respect] to all Your commandments [as my guide].
AMP.7:
I will give thanks to You with an upright heart,
When I learn [through discipline] Your righteous judgments [for my transgressions].
AMP.8:
I shall keep Your statutes;
Do not utterly abandon me [when I fail].
AMP.9:
Beth. How can a young man keep his way pure?
By keeping watch [on himself] according to Your word [conforming his life to Your precepts].
AMP.10:
With all my heart I have sought You, [inquiring of You and longing for You];
Do not let me wander from Your commandments [neither through ignorance nor by willful disobedience].
AMP.11:
Your word I have treasured and stored in my heart,
That I may not sin against You.
AMP.12:
Blessed and reverently praised are You, O LORD;
Teach me Your statutes.
AMP.13:
With my lips I have told of
All the ordinances of Your mouth.
AMP.14:
I have rejoiced in the way of Your testimonies,
As much as in all riches.
AMP.15:
I will meditate on Your precepts
And [thoughtfully] regard Your ways [the path of life established by Your precepts].
AMP.16:
I will delight in Your statutes;
I will not forget Your word.
AMP.17:
Gimel. Deal bountifully with Your servant,
That I may live and keep Your word [treasuring it and being guided by it day by day].
AMP.18:
Open my eyes [to spiritual truth] so that I may behold
Wonderful things from Your law.
AMP.19:
I am a stranger on the earth;
Do not hide Your commandments from me.
AMP.20:
My soul is crushed with longing
For Your ordinances at all times.
AMP.21:
You rebuke the presumptuous and arrogant, the cursed ones,
Who wander from Your commandments.
AMP.22:
Take reproach and contempt away from me,
For I observe Your testimonies.
AMP.23:
Even though princes sit and talk to one another against me,
Your servant meditates on Your statutes.
AMP.24:
Your testimonies also are my delight
And my counselors.
AMP.25:
Daleth. My earthly life clings to the dust;
Revive and refresh me according to Your word.
AMP.26:
I have told of my ways, and You have answered me;
Teach me Your statutes.
AMP.27:
Make me understand the way of Your precepts,
So that I will meditate (focus my thoughts) on Your wonderful works.
AMP.28:
My soul dissolves because of grief;
Renew and strengthen me according to [the promises of] Your word.
AMP.29:
Remove from me the way of falsehood and unfaithfulness,
And graciously grant me Your law.
AMP.30:
I have chosen the faithful way;
I have placed Your ordinances before me.
AMP.31:
I cling tightly to Your testimonies;
O LORD, do not put me to shame!
AMP.32:
I will run the way of Your commandments [with purpose],
For You will give me a heart that is willing.
AMP.33:
He. Teach me, O LORD, the way of Your statutes,
And I will [steadfastly] observe it to the end.
AMP.34:
Give me understanding [a teachable heart and the ability to learn], that I may keep Your law;
And observe it with all my heart.
AMP.35:
Make me walk in the path of Your commandments,
For I delight in it.
AMP.36:
Incline my heart to Your testimonies
And not to dishonest gain and envy.
AMP.37:
Turn my eyes away from vanity [all those worldly, meaningless things that distract—let Your priorities be mine],
And restore me [with renewed energy] in Your ways.
AMP.38:
Establish Your word and confirm Your promise to Your servant,
As that which produces [awe-inspired] reverence for You.
AMP.39:
Turn away my reproach which I dread,
For Your ordinances are good.
AMP.40:
I long for Your precepts;
Renew me through Your righteousness.
AMP.41:
Vav. May Your lovingkindness also come to me, O LORD,
Your salvation according to Your promise;
AMP.42:
So I will have an answer for the one who taunts me,
For I trust [completely] in Your word [and its reliability].
AMP.43:
And do not take the word of truth utterly out of my mouth,
For I wait for Your ordinances.
AMP.44:
I will keep Your law continually,
Forever and ever [writing Your precepts on my heart].
AMP.45:
And I will walk at liberty,
For I seek and deeply long for Your precepts.
AMP.46:
I will also speak of Your testimonies before kings
And shall not be ashamed.
AMP.47:
For I shall delight in Your commandments,
Which I love.
AMP.48:
And I shall lift up my hands to Your commandments,
Which I love;
And I will meditate on Your statutes.
AMP.49:
Zayin. Remember [always] the word and promise to Your servant,
In which You have made me hope.
AMP.50:
This is my comfort in my affliction,
That Your word has revived me and given me life.
AMP.51:
The arrogant utterly ridicule me,
Yet I do not turn away from Your law.
AMP.52:
I have remembered [carefully] Your ancient ordinances, O LORD,
And I have taken comfort.
AMP.53:
Burning indignation has seized me because of the wicked,
Who reject Your law.
AMP.54:
Your statutes are my songs
In the house of my pilgrimage.
AMP.55:
O LORD, I remember Your name in the night,
And keep Your law.
AMP.56:
This has become mine [as the gift of Your grace],
That I observe Your precepts [accepting them with loving obedience].
AMP.57:
Heth. The LORD is my portion;
I have promised to keep Your words.
AMP.58:
I sought Your favor with all my heart;
Be merciful and gracious to me according to Your promise.
AMP.59:
I considered my ways
And turned my feet to [follow and obey] Your testimonies.
AMP.60:
I hurried and did not delay
To keep Your commandments.
AMP.61:
The cords of the wicked have encircled and ensnared me,
But I have not forgotten Your law.
AMP.62:
At midnight I will rise to give thanks to You
Because of Your righteous ordinances.
AMP.63:
I am a companion of all who [reverently] fear You,
And of those who keep and honor Your precepts.
AMP.64:
The earth, O LORD, is full of Your lovingkindness and goodness;
Teach me Your statutes.
AMP.65:
Teth. You have dealt well with Your servant,
O LORD, according to Your promise.
AMP.66:
Teach me good judgment (discernment) and knowledge,
For I have believed and trusted and relied on Your commandments.
AMP.67:
Before I was afflicted I went astray,
But now I keep and honor Your word [with loving obedience].
AMP.68:
You are good and do good;
Teach me Your statutes.
AMP.69:
The arrogant have forged a lie against me,
But I will keep Your precepts with all my heart.
AMP.70:
Their heart is insensitive like fat [their minds are dull and brutal],
But I delight in Your law.
AMP.71:
It is good for me that I have been afflicted,
That I may learn Your statutes.
AMP.72:
The law from Your mouth is better to me
Than thousands of gold and silver pieces.
AMP.73:
Yodh. Your hands have made me and established me;
Give me understanding and a teachable heart, that I may learn Your commandments.
AMP.74:
May those who [reverently] fear You see me and be glad,
Because I wait for Your word.
AMP.75:
I know, O LORD, that Your judgments are fair,
And that in faithfulness You have disciplined me.
AMP.76:
O may Your lovingkindness and graciousness comfort me,
According to Your word (promise) to Your servant.
AMP.77:
Let Your compassion come to me that I may live,
For Your law is my delight.
AMP.78:
Let the arrogant be ashamed and humiliated, for they sabotage me with a lie;
But I will meditate on Your precepts.
AMP.79:
May those who fear You [with submissive wonder] turn to me,
Even those who have known Your testimonies.
AMP.80:
May my heart be blameless in Your statutes,
So that I will not be ashamed.
AMP.81:
Kaph. My soul languishes and grows weak for Your salvation;
I wait for Your word.
AMP.82:
My eyes fail [with longing, watching] for [the fulfillment of] Your promise,
Saying, "When will You comfort me?"
AMP.83:
For I have become like a wineskin [blackened and shriveled] in the smoke [in which it hangs],
Yet I do not forget Your statutes.
AMP.84:
How many are the days of Your servant [which he must endure]?
When will You execute judgment on those who persecute me?
AMP.85:
The arrogant (godless) have dug pits for me,
Men who do not conform to Your law.
AMP.86:
All Your commandments are faithful and trustworthy.
They have persecuted me with a lie; help me [LORD]!
AMP.87:
They had almost destroyed me on earth,
But as for me, I did not turn away from Your precepts.
AMP.88:
According to Your steadfast love refresh me and give me life,
So that I may keep and obey the testimony of Your mouth.
AMP.89:
Lamedh. Forever, O LORD,
Your word is settled in heaven [standing firm and unchangeable].
AMP.90:
Your faithfulness continues from generation to generation;
You have established the earth, and it stands [securely].
AMP.91:
They continue this day according to Your ordinances,
For all things [all parts of the universe] are Your servants.
AMP.92:
If Your law had not been my delight,
Then I would have perished in my time of trouble.
AMP.93:
I will never forget Your precepts,
For by them You have revived me and given me life.
AMP.94:
I am Yours, save me [as Your own];
For I have [diligently] sought Your precepts and required them [as my greatest need].
AMP.95:
The wicked wait for me to destroy me,
But I will consider Your testimonies.
AMP.96:
I have seen that all [human] perfection has its limits [no matter how grand and perfect and noble];
Your commandment is exceedingly broad and extends without limits [into eternity].
AMP.97:
Mem. Oh, how I love Your law!
It is my meditation all the day.
AMP.98:
Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies,
For Your words are always with me.
AMP.99:
I have better understanding and deeper insight than all my teachers [because of Your word],
For Your testimonies are my meditation.
AMP.100:
I understand more than the aged [who have not observed Your precepts],
Because I have observed and kept Your precepts.
AMP.101:
I have restrained my feet from every evil way,
That I may keep Your word.
AMP.102:
I have not turned aside from Your ordinances,
For You Yourself have taught me.
AMP.103:
How sweet are Your words to my taste,
Sweeter than honey to my mouth!
AMP.104:
From Your precepts I get understanding;
Therefore I hate every false way.
AMP.105:
Nun. Your word is a lamp to my feet
And a light to my path.
AMP.106:
I have sworn [an oath] and have confirmed it,
That I will keep Your righteous ordinances.
AMP.107:
I am greatly afflicted;
Renew and revive me [giving me life], O LORD, according to Your word.
AMP.108:
Accept and take pleasure in the freewill offerings of my mouth, O LORD,
And teach me Your ordinances.
AMP.109:
My life is continually in my hand,
Yet I do not forget Your law.
AMP.110:
The wicked have laid a snare for me,
Yet I do not wander from Your precepts.
AMP.111:
I have taken Your testimonies as a heritage forever,
For they are the joy of my heart.
AMP.112:
I have inclined my heart to perform Your statutes
Forever, even to the end.
AMP.113:
Samekh. I hate those who are double-minded,
But I love and treasure Your law.
AMP.114:
You are my hiding place and my shield;
I wait for Your word.
AMP.115:
Leave me, you evildoers,
That I may keep the commandments of my God [honoring and obeying them].
AMP.116:
Uphold me according to Your word [of promise], so that I may live;
And do not let me be ashamed of my hope [in Your great goodness].
AMP.117:
Uphold me that I may be safe,
That I may have regard for Your statutes continually.
AMP.118:
You have turned Your back on all those who wander from Your statutes,
For their deceitfulness is useless.
AMP.119:
You have removed all the wicked of the earth like dross [for they have no value];
Therefore I love Your testimonies.
AMP.120:
My flesh trembles in [reverent] fear of You,
And I am afraid and in awe of Your judgments.
AMP.121:
Ayin. I have done justice and righteousness;
Do not leave me to those who oppress me.
AMP.122:
Be the guarantee for Your servant for good [as Judah was the guarantee for Benjamin];
Do not let the arrogant oppress me.
AMP.123:
My eyes fail [with longing, watching] for [the fulfillment of] Your salvation,
And for [the fulfillment of] Your righteous word.
AMP.124:
Deal with Your servant according to Your [gracious] lovingkindness,
And teach me Your statutes.
AMP.125:
I am Your servant; give me understanding [the ability to learn and a teachable heart]
That I may know Your testimonies.
AMP.126:
It is time for the LORD to act;
They have broken Your law.
AMP.127:
Therefore I love Your commandments more than gold,
Yes, more than refined gold.
AMP.128:
Therefore I esteem as right all Your precepts concerning everything;
I hate every false way.
AMP.129:
Pe. Your testimonies are wonderful;
Therefore my soul keeps them.
AMP.130:
The unfolding of Your [glorious] words give light;
Their unfolding gives understanding to the simple (childlike).
AMP.131:
I opened my mouth and panted [with anticipation],
Because I longed for Your commandments.
AMP.132:
Turn to me and be gracious to me and show me favor,
As is Your way to those who love Your name.
AMP.133:
Establish my footsteps in [the way of] Your word;
Do not let any human weakness have power over me [causing me to be separated from You].
AMP.134:
Redeem me from the oppression of man;
That I may keep Your precepts.
AMP.135:
Make Your face shine [with pleasure] upon Your servant,
And teach me Your statutes.
AMP.136:
My eyes weep streams of water
Because people do not keep Your law.
AMP.137:
Tsadhe. Righteous are You, O LORD,
And upright are Your judgments.
AMP.138:
You have commanded Your testimonies in righteousness
And in great faithfulness.
AMP.139:
My zeal has [completely] consumed me,
Because my enemies have forgotten Your words.
AMP.140:
Your word is very pure (refined);
Therefore Your servant loves it.
AMP.141:
I am small and despised,
But I do not forget Your precepts.
AMP.142:
Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness,
And Your law is truth.
AMP.143:
Trouble and anguish have found me,
Yet Your commandments are my delight and my joy.
AMP.144:
Your righteous testimonies are everlasting;
Give me understanding [the ability to learn and a teachable heart] that I may live.
AMP.145:
Qoph. I cried with all my heart; answer me, O LORD!
I will observe Your statutes.
AMP.146:
I cried to You; save me
And I will keep Your testimonies.
AMP.147:
I rise before dawn and cry [in prayer] for help;
I wait for Your word.
AMP.148:
My eyes anticipate the night watches and I awake before the call of the watchman,
That I may meditate on Your word.
AMP.149:
Hear my voice according to Your [steadfast] lovingkindness;
O LORD, renew and refresh me according to Your ordinances.
AMP.150:
Those who follow after wickedness approach;
They are far from Your law.
AMP.151:
You are near, O LORD,
And all Your commandments are truth.
AMP.152:
Of old I have known from Your testimonies
That You have founded them forever.
AMP.153:
Resh. Look upon my agony and rescue me,
For I do not forget Your law.
AMP.154:
Plead my cause and redeem me;
Revive me and give me life according to [the promise of] Your word.
AMP.155:
Salvation is far from the wicked,
For they do not seek Your statutes.
AMP.156:
Great are Your tender mercies and steadfast love, O LORD;
Revive me and give me life according to Your ordinances.
AMP.157:
Many are my persecutors and my adversaries,
Yet I do not turn away from Your testimonies.
AMP.158:
I see the treacherous and loathe them,
Because they do not respect Your law.
AMP.159:
Consider how I love Your precepts;
Revive me and give me life, O LORD, according to Your lovingkindness.
AMP.160:
The sum of Your word is truth [the full meaning of all Your precepts],
And every one of Your righteous ordinances endures forever.
AMP.161:
Shin. Princes persecute me without cause,
But my heart stands in [reverent] awe of Your words [so I can expect You to help me].
AMP.162:
I rejoice at Your word,
As one who finds great treasure.
AMP.163:
I hate and detest falsehood,
But I love Your law.
AMP.164:
Seven times a day I praise You,
Because of Your righteous ordinances.
AMP.165:
Those who love Your law have great peace;
Nothing makes them stumble.
AMP.166:
I hope and wait [with complete confidence] for Your salvation, O LORD,
And I do Your commandments.
AMP.167:
My soul keeps Your testimonies [hearing and accepting and obeying them];
I love them greatly.
AMP.168:
I keep Your precepts and Your testimonies,
For all my ways are [fully known] before You.
AMP.169:
Tav. Let my [mournful] cry come before You, O LORD;
Give me understanding [the ability to learn and a teachable heart] according to Your word [of promise].
AMP.170:
Let my supplication come before You;
Deliver me according to Your word.
AMP.171:
Let my lips speak praise [with thanksgiving],
For You teach me Your statutes.
AMP.172:
Let my tongue sing [praise for the fulfillment] of Your word,
For all Your commandments are righteous.
AMP.173:
Let Your hand be ready to help me,
For I have chosen Your precepts.
AMP.174:
I long for Your salvation, O LORD,
And Your law is my delight.
AMP.175:
Let my soul live that it may praise You,
And let Your ordinances help me.
AMP.176:
I have gone astray like a lost sheep;
Seek Your servant, for I do not forget Your commandments.

MSG.1:
You're blessed when you stay on course,
walking steadily on the road revealed by God.
MSG.2:
You're blessed when you follow his directions,
doing your best to find him.
MSG.3:
That's right—you don't go off on your own;
you walk straight along the road he set.
MSG.4:
You, God, prescribed the right way to live;
now you expect us to live it.
MSG.5:
Oh, that my steps might be steady,
keeping to the course you set;
MSG.6:
Then I'd never have any regrets
in comparing my life with your counsel.
MSG.7:
I thank you for speaking straight from your heart;
I learn the pattern of your righteous ways.
MSG.8:
I'm going to do what you tell me to do;
don't ever walk off and leave me.
MSG.9:
How can a young person live a clean life?
By carefully reading the map of your Word.
MSG.10:
I'm single-minded in pursuit of you;
don't let me miss the road signs you've posted.
MSG.11:
I've banked your promises in the vault of my heart
so I won't sin myself bankrupt.
MSG.12:
Be blessed, God;
train me in your ways of wise living.
MSG.13:
I'll transfer to my lips
all the counsel that comes from your mouth;
MSG.14:
I delight far more in what you tell me about living
than in gathering a pile of riches.
MSG.15:
I ponder every morsel of wisdom from you,
I attentively watch how you've done it.
MSG.16:
I relish everything you've told me of life,
I won't forget a word of it.
MSG.17:
Be generous with me and I'll live a full life;
not for a minute will I take my eyes off your road.
MSG.18:
Open my eyes so I can see
what you show me of your miracle-wonders.
MSG.19:
I'm a stranger in these parts;
give me clear directions.
MSG.20:
My soul is starved and hungry, ravenous!—
insatiable for your nourishing commands.
MSG.21:
And those who think they know so much,
ignoring everything you tell them—let them have it!
MSG.22:
Don't let them mock and humiliate me;
I've been careful to do just what you said.
MSG.23:
While bad neighbors maliciously gossip about me,
I'm absorbed in pondering your wise counsel.
MSG.24:
Yes, your sayings on life are what give me delight;
I listen to them as to good neighbors!
MSG.25:
I'm feeling terrible—I couldn't feel worse!
Get me on my feet again. You promised, remember?
MSG.26:
When I told my story, you responded;
train me well in your deep wisdom.
MSG.27:
Help me understand these things inside and out
so I can ponder your miracle-wonders.
MSG.28:
My sad life's dilapidated, a falling-down barn;
build me up again by your Word.
MSG.29:
Barricade the road that goes Nowhere;
grace me with your clear revelation.
MSG.30:
I choose the true road to Somewhere,
I post your road signs at every curve and corner.
MSG.31:
I grasp and cling to whatever you tell me;
God, don't let me down!
MSG.32:
I'll run the course you lay out for me
if you'll just show me how.
MSG.33:
God, teach me lessons for living
so I can stay the course.
MSG.34:
Give me insight so I can do what you tell me—
my whole life one long, obedient response.
MSG.35:
Guide me down the road of your commandments;
I love traveling this freeway!
MSG.36:
Give me a bent for your words of wisdom,
and not for piling up loot.
MSG.37:
Divert my eyes from toys and trinkets,
invigorate me on the pilgrim way.
MSG.38:
Affirm your promises to me—
promises made to all who fear you.
MSG.39:
Deflect the harsh words of my critics—
but what you say is always so good.
MSG.40:
See how hungry I am for your counsel;
preserve my life through your righteous ways!
MSG.41:
Let your love, God, shape my life
with salvation, exactly as you promised;
MSG.42:
Then I'll be able to stand up to mockery
because I trusted your Word.
MSG.43:
Don't ever deprive me of truth, not ever—
your commandments are what I depend on.
MSG.44:
Oh, I'll guard with my life what you've revealed to me,
guard it now, guard it ever;
MSG.45:
And I'll stride freely through wide open spaces
as I look for your truth and your wisdom;
MSG.46:
Then I'll tell the world what I find,
speak out boldly in public, unembarrassed.
MSG.47: I cherish your commandments—oh, how I love them!—
MSG.48: relishing every fragment of your counsel.
MSG.49:
Remember what you said to me, your servant—
I hang on to these words for dear life!
MSG.50:
These words hold me up in bad times;
yes, your promises rejuvenate me.
MSG.51:
The insolent ridicule me without mercy,
but I don't budge from your revelation.
MSG.52:
I watch for your ancient landmark words,
and know I'm on the right track.
MSG.53:
But when I see the wicked ignore your directions,
I'm beside myself with anger.
MSG.54:
I set your instructions to music
and sing them as I walk this pilgrim way.
MSG.55:
I meditate on your name all night, God,
treasuring your revelation, O God.
MSG.56:
Still, I walk through a rain of derision
because I live by your Word and counsel.
MSG.57:
Because you have satisfied me, God, I promise
to do everything you say.
MSG.58:
I beg you from the bottom of my heart: smile,
be gracious to me just as you promised.
MSG.59:
When I took a long, careful look at your ways,
I got my feet back on the trail you blazed.
MSG.60:
I was up at once, didn't drag my feet,
was quick to follow your orders.
MSG.61:
The wicked hemmed me in—there was no way out—
but not for a minute did I forget your plan for me.
MSG.62:
I get up in the middle of the night to thank you;
your decisions are so right, so true—I can't wait till morning!
MSG.63:
I'm a friend and companion of all who fear you,
of those committed to living by your rules.
MSG.64:
Your love, God, fills the earth!
Train me to live by your counsel.
MSG.65:
Be good to your servant, God;
be as good as your Word.
MSG.66:
Train me in good common sense;
I'm thoroughly committed to living your way.
MSG.67:
Before I learned to answer you, I wandered all over the place,
but now I'm in step with your Word.
MSG.68:
You are good, and the source of good;
train me in your goodness.
MSG.69:
The godless spread lies about me,
but I focus my attention on what you are saying;
MSG.70:
They're bland as a bucket of lard,
while I dance to the tune of your revelation.
MSG.71:
My troubles turned out all for the best—
they forced me to learn from your textbook.
MSG.72:
Truth from your mouth means more to me
than striking it rich in a gold mine.
MSG.73:
With your very own hands you formed me;
now breathe your wisdom over me so I can understand you.
MSG.74:
When they see me waiting, expecting your Word,
those who fear you will take heart and be glad.
MSG.75:
I can see now, God, that your decisions are right;
your testing has taught me what's true and right.
MSG.76:
Oh, love me—and right now!—hold me tight!
just the way you promised.
MSG.77:
Now comfort me so I can live, really live;
your revelation is the tune I dance to.
MSG.78:
Let the fast-talking tricksters be exposed as frauds;
they tried to sell me a bill of goods,
but I kept my mind fixed on your counsel.
MSG.79:
Let those who fear you turn to me
for evidence of your wise guidance.
MSG.80:
And let me live whole and holy, soul and body,
so I can always walk with my head held high.
MSG.81:
I'm homesick—longing for your salvation;
I'm waiting for your word of hope.
MSG.82:
My eyes grow heavy watching for some sign of your promise;
how long must I wait for your comfort?
MSG.83:
There's smoke in my eyes—they burn and water,
but I keep a steady gaze on the instructions you post.
MSG.84:
How long do I have to put up with all this?
How long till you haul my tormentors into court?
MSG.85:
The arrogant godless try to throw me off track,
ignorant as they are of God and his ways.
MSG.86:
Everything you command is a sure thing,
but they harass me with lies. Help!
MSG.87:
They've pushed and pushed—they never let up—
but I haven't relaxed my grip on your counsel.
MSG.88:
In your great love revive me
so I can alertly obey your every word.
MSG.89:
What you say goes, God,
and stays, as permanent as the heavens.
MSG.90:
Your truth never goes out of fashion;
it's as up-to-date as the earth when the sun comes up.
MSG.91:
Your Word and truth are dependable as ever;
that's what you ordered—you set the earth going.
MSG.92:
If your revelation hadn't delighted me so,
I would have given up when the hard times came.
MSG.93:
But I'll never forget the advice you gave me;
you saved my life with those wise words.
MSG.94:
Save me! I'm all yours.
I look high and low for your words of wisdom.
MSG.95:
The wicked lie in ambush to destroy me,
but I'm only concerned with your plans for me.
MSG.96:
I see the limits to everything human,
but the horizons can't contain your commands!
MSG.97:
Oh, how I love all you've revealed;
I reverently ponder it all the day long.
MSG.98:
Your commands give me an edge on my enemies;
they never become obsolete.
MSG.99:
I've even become smarter than my teachers
since I've pondered and absorbed your counsel.
MSG.100:
I've become wiser than the wise old sages
simply by doing what you tell me.
MSG.101:
I watch my step, avoiding the ditches and ruts of evil
so I can spend all my time keeping your Word.
MSG.102:
I never make detours from the route you laid out;
you gave me such good directions.
MSG.103:
Your words are so choice, so tasty;
I prefer them to the best home cooking.
MSG.104:
With your instruction, I understand life;
that's why I hate false propaganda.
MSG.105:
By your words I can see where I'm going;
they throw a beam of light on my dark path.
MSG.106:
I've committed myself and I'll never turn back
from living by your righteous order.
MSG.107:
Everything's falling apart on me, God;
put me together again with your Word.
MSG.108:
Festoon me with your finest sayings, God;
teach me your holy rules.
MSG.109:
My life is as close as my own hands,
but I don't forget what you have revealed.
MSG.110:
The wicked do their best to throw me off track,
but I don't swerve an inch from your course.
MSG.111:
I inherited your book on living; it's mine forever—
what a gift! And how happy it makes me!
MSG.112:
I concentrate on doing exactly what you say—
I always have and always will.
MSG.113:
I hate the two-faced,
but I love your clear-cut revelation.
MSG.114:
You're my place of quiet retreat;
I wait for your Word to renew me.
MSG.115:
Get out of my life, evildoers,
so I can keep my God's commands.
MSG.116:
Take my side as you promised; I'll live then for sure.
Don't disappoint all my grand hopes.
MSG.117:
Stick with me and I'll be all right;
I'll give total allegiance to your definitions of life.
MSG.118:
Expose all who drift away from your sayings;
their casual idolatry is lethal.
MSG.119:
You reject earth's wicked as so much rubbish;
therefore I lovingly embrace everything you say.
MSG.120:
I shiver in awe before you;
your decisions leave me speechless with reverence.
MSG.121:
I stood up for justice and the right;
don't leave me to the mercy of my oppressors.
MSG.122:
Take the side of your servant, good God;
don't let the godless take advantage of me.
MSG.123:
I can't keep my eyes open any longer, waiting for you
to keep your promise to set everything right.
MSG.124:
Let your love dictate how you deal with me;
teach me from your textbook on life.
MSG.125:
I'm your servant—help me understand what that means,
the inner meaning of your instructions.
MSG.126:
It's time to act, God;
they've made a shambles of your revelation!
MSG.127:
Yea-Saying God, I love what you command,
I love it better than gold and gemstones;
MSG.128:
Yea-Saying God, I honor everything you tell me,
I despise every deceitful detour.
MSG.129:
Every word you give me is a miracle word—
how could I help but obey?
MSG.130:
Break open your words, let the light shine out,
let ordinary people see the meaning.
MSG.131:
Mouth open and panting,
I wanted your commands more than anything.
MSG.132:
Turn my way, look kindly on me,
as you always do to those who personally love you.
MSG.133:
Steady my steps with your Word of promise
so nothing malign gets the better of me.
MSG.134:
Rescue me from the grip of bad men and women
so I can live life your way.
MSG.135:
Smile on me, your servant;
teach me the right way to live.
MSG.136:
I cry rivers of tears
because nobody's living by your book!
MSG.137:
You are right and you do right, God;
your decisions are right on target.
MSG.138:
You rightly instruct us in how to live
ever faithful to you.
MSG.139:
My rivals nearly did me in,
they persistently ignored your commandments.
MSG.140:
Your promise has been tested through and through,
and I, your servant, love it dearly.
MSG.141:
I'm too young to be important,
but I don't forget what you tell me.
MSG.142:
Your righteousness is eternally right,
your revelation is the only truth.
MSG.143:
Even though troubles came down on me hard,
your commands always gave me delight.
MSG.144:
The way you tell me to live is always right;
help me understand it so I can live to the fullest.
MSG.145:
I call out at the top of my lungs,
"God! Answer! I'll do whatever you say."
MSG.146:
I called to you, "Save me
so I can carry out all your instructions."
MSG.147:
I was up before sunrise,
crying for help, hoping for a word from you.
MSG.148:
I stayed awake all night,
prayerfully pondering your promise.
MSG.149:
In your love, listen to me;
in your justice, God, keep me alive.
MSG.150:
As those out to get me come closer and closer,
they go farther and farther from the truth you reveal;
MSG.151:
But you're the closest of all to me, God,
and all your judgments true.
MSG.152:
I've known all along from the evidence of your words
that you meant them to last forever.
MSG.153:
Take a good look at my trouble, and help me—
I haven't forgotten your revelation.
MSG.154:
Take my side and get me out of this;
give me back my life, just as you promised.
MSG.155:
"Salvation" is only gibberish to the wicked
because they've never looked it up in your dictionary.
MSG.156:
Your mercies, God, run into the billions;
following your guidelines, revive me.
MSG.157:
My antagonists are too many to count,
but I don't swerve from the directions you gave.
MSG.158:
I took one look at the quitters and was filled with loathing;
they walked away from your promises so casually!
MSG.159:
Take note of how I love what you tell me;
out of your life of love, prolong my life.
MSG.160:
Your words all add up to the sum total: Truth.
Your righteous decisions are eternal.
MSG.161:
I've been slandered unmercifully by the politicians,
but my awe at your words keeps me stable.
MSG.162:
I'm ecstatic over what you say,
like one who strikes it rich.
MSG.163:
I hate lies—can't stand them!—
but I love what you have revealed.
MSG.164:
Seven times each day I stop and shout praises
for the way you keep everything running right.
MSG.165:
For those who love what you reveal, everything fits—
no stumbling around in the dark for them.
MSG.166:
I wait expectantly for your salvation;
God, I do what you tell me.
MSG.167:
My soul guards and keeps all your instructions—
oh, how much I love them!
MSG.168:
I follow your directions, abide by your counsel;
my life's an open book before you.
MSG.169:
Let my cry come right into your presence, God;
provide me with the insight that comes only from your Word.
MSG.170:
Give my request your personal attention,
rescue me on the terms of your promise.
MSG.171:
Let praise cascade off my lips;
after all, you've taught me the truth about life!
MSG.172:
And let your promises ring from my tongue;
every order you've given is right.
MSG.173:
Put your hand out and steady me
since I've chosen to live by your counsel.
MSG.174:
I'm homesick, God, for your salvation;
I love it when you show yourself!
MSG.175:
Invigorate my soul so I can praise you well,
use your decrees to put iron in my soul.
MSG.176:
And should I wander off like a lost sheep—seek me!
I'll recognize the sound of your voice.

NIV.1:

do not utterly forsake me.
NIV.9:
ב Beth

ג Gimel

NRSVCE.67:
Before I was humbled I went astray,
but now I keep your word.
NRSVCE.68:
You are good and do good;
teach me your statutes.
NRSVCE.69:
The arrogant smear me with lies,
but with my whole heart I keep your precepts.
NRSVCE.70:
Their hearts are fat and gross,
but I delight in your law.
NRSVCE.71:
It is good for me that I was humbled,
so that I might learn your statutes.
NRSVCE.72:
The law of your mouth is better to me
than thousands of gold and silver pieces.
NRSVCE.73:
Your hands have made and fashioned me;
give me understanding that I may learn your commandments.
NRSVCE.74:
Those who fear you shall see me and rejoice,
because I have hoped in your word.
NRSVCE.75:
I know, O LORD, that your judgments are right,
and that in faithfulness you have humbled me.
NRSVCE.76:
Let your steadfast love become my comfort
according to your promise to your servant.
NRSVCE.77:
Let your mercy come to me, that I may live;
for your law is my delight.
NRSVCE.78:
Let the arrogant be put to shame,
because they have subverted me with guile;
as for me, I will meditate on your precepts.
NRSVCE.79:
Let those who fear you turn to me,
so that they may know your decrees.
NRSVCE.80:
May my heart be blameless in your statutes,
so that I may not be put to shame.
NRSVCE.81:
My soul languishes for your salvation;
I hope in your word.
NRSVCE.82:
My eyes fail with watching for your promise;
I ask, “When will you comfort me?”
NRSVCE.83:
For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke,
yet I have not forgotten your statutes.
NRSVCE.84:
How long must your servant endure?
When will you judge those who persecute me?
NRSVCE.85:
The arrogant have dug pitfalls for me;
they flout your law.
NRSVCE.86:
All your commandments are enduring;
I am persecuted without cause; help me!
NRSVCE.87:
They have almost made an end of me on earth;
but I have not forsaken your precepts.
NRSVCE.88:
In your steadfast love spare my life,
so that I may keep the decrees of your mouth.
NRSVCE.89:
The LORD exists forever;
your word is firmly fixed in heaven.
NRSVCE.90:
Your faithfulness endures to all generations;
you have established the earth, and it stands fast.
NRSVCE.91:
By your appointment they stand today,
for all things are your servants.
NRSVCE.92:
If your law had not been my delight,
I would have perished in my misery.
NRSVCE.93:
I will never forget your precepts,
for by them you have given me life.
NRSVCE.94:
I am yours; save me,
for I have sought your precepts.
NRSVCE.95:
The wicked lie in wait to destroy me,
but I consider your decrees.
NRSVCE.96:
I have seen a limit to all perfection,
but your commandment is exceedingly broad.
NRSVCE.97:
Oh, how I love your law!
It is my meditation all day long.
NRSVCE.98:
Your commandment makes me wiser than my enemies,
for it is always with me.
NRSVCE.99:
I have more understanding than all my teachers,
for your decrees are my meditation.
NRSVCE.100:
I understand more than the aged,
for I keep your precepts.
NRSVCE.101:
I hold back my feet from every evil way,
in order to keep your word.
NRSVCE.102:
I do not turn away from your ordinances,
for you have taught me.
NRSVCE.103:
How sweet are your words to my taste,
sweeter than honey to my mouth!
NRSVCE.104:
Through your precepts I get understanding;
therefore I hate every false way.
NRSVCE.105:
Your word is a lamp to my feet
and a light to my path.
NRSVCE.106:
I have sworn an oath and confirmed it,
to observe your righteous ordinances.
NRSVCE.107:
I am severely afflicted;
give me life, O LORD, according to your word.
NRSVCE.108:
Accept my offerings of praise, O LORD,
and teach me your ordinances.
NRSVCE.109:
I hold my life in my hand continually,
but I do not forget your law.
NRSVCE.110:
The wicked have laid a snare for me,
but I do not stray from your precepts.
NRSVCE.111:
Your decrees are my heritage forever;
they are the joy of my heart.
NRSVCE.112:
I incline my heart to perform your statutes
forever, to the end.
NRSVCE.113:
I hate the double-minded,
but I love your law.
NRSVCE.114:
You are my hiding place and my shield;
I hope in your word.
NRSVCE.115:
Go away from me, you evildoers,
that I may keep the commandments of my God.
NRSVCE.116:
Uphold me according to your promise, that I may live,
and let me not be put to shame in my hope.
NRSVCE.117:
Hold me up, that I may be safe
and have regard for your statutes continually.
NRSVCE.118:
You spurn all who go astray from your statutes;
for their cunning is in vain.
NRSVCE.119:
All the wicked of the earth you count as dross;
therefore I love your decrees.
NRSVCE.120:
My flesh trembles for fear of you,
and I am afraid of your judgments.
NRSVCE.121:
I have done what is just and right;
do not leave me to my oppressors.
NRSVCE.122:
Guarantee your servant’s well-being;
do not let the godless oppress me.
NRSVCE.123:
My eyes fail from watching for your salvation,
and for the fulfillment of your righteous promise.
NRSVCE.124:
Deal with your servant according to your steadfast love,
and teach me your statutes.
NRSVCE.125:
I am your servant; give me understanding,
so that I may know your decrees.
NRSVCE.126:
It is time for the LORD to act,
for your law has been broken.
NRSVCE.127:
Truly I love your commandments
more than gold, more than fine gold.
NRSVCE.128:
Truly I direct my steps by all your precepts;
I hate every false way.
NRSVCE.129:
Your decrees are wonderful;
therefore my soul keeps them.
NRSVCE.130:
The unfolding of your words gives light;
it imparts understanding to the simple.
NRSVCE.131:
With open mouth I pant,
because I long for your commandments.
NRSVCE.132:
Turn to me and be gracious to me,
as is your custom toward those who love your name.
NRSVCE.133:
Keep my steps steady according to your promise,
and never let iniquity have dominion over me.
NRSVCE.134:
Redeem me from human oppression,
that I may keep your precepts.
NRSVCE.135:
Make your face shine upon your servant,
and teach me your statutes.
NRSVCE.136:
My eyes shed streams of tears
because your law is not kept.
NRSVCE.137:
You are righteous, O LORD,
and your judgments are right.
NRSVCE.138:
You have appointed your decrees in righteousness
and in all faithfulness.
NRSVCE.139:
My zeal consumes me
because my foes forget your words.
NRSVCE.140:
Your promise is well tried,
and your servant loves it.
NRSVCE.141:
I am small and despised,
yet I do not forget your precepts.
NRSVCE.142:
Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness,
and your law is the truth.
NRSVCE.143:
Trouble and anguish have come upon me,
but your commandments are my delight.
NRSVCE.144:
Your decrees are righteous forever;
give me understanding that I may live.
NRSVCE.145:
With my whole heart I cry; answer me, O LORD.
I will keep your statutes.
NRSVCE.146:
I cry to you; save me,
that I may observe your decrees.
NRSVCE.147:
I rise before dawn and cry for help;
I put my hope in your words.
NRSVCE.148:
My eyes are awake before each watch of the night,
that I may meditate on your promise.
NRSVCE.149:
In your steadfast love hear my voice;
O LORD, in your justice preserve my life.
NRSVCE.150:
Those who persecute me with evil purpose draw near;
they are far from your law.
NRSVCE.151:
Yet you are near, O LORD,
and all your commandments are true.
NRSVCE.152:
Long ago I learned from your decrees
that you have established them forever.
NRSVCE.153:
Look on my misery and rescue me,
for I do not forget your law.
NRSVCE.154:
Plead my cause and redeem me;
give me life according to your promise.
NRSVCE.155:
Salvation is far from the wicked,
for they do not seek your statutes.
NRSVCE.156:
Great is your mercy, O LORD;
give me life according to your justice.
NRSVCE.157:
Many are my persecutors and my adversaries,
yet I do not swerve from your decrees.
NRSVCE.158:
I look at the faithless with disgust,
because they do not keep your commands.
NRSVCE.159:
Consider how I love your precepts;
preserve my life according to your steadfast love.
NRSVCE.160:
The sum of your word is truth;
and every one of your righteous ordinances endures forever.
NRSVCE.161:
Princes persecute me without cause,
but my heart stands in awe of your words.
NRSVCE.162:
I rejoice at your word
like one who finds great spoil.
NRSVCE.163:
I hate and abhor falsehood,
but I love your law.
NRSVCE.164:
Seven times a day I praise you
for your righteous ordinances.
NRSVCE.165:
Great peace have those who love your law;
nothing can make them stumble.
NRSVCE.166:
I hope for your salvation, O LORD,
and I fulfill your commandments.
NRSVCE.167:
My soul keeps your decrees;
I love them exceedingly.
NRSVCE.168:
I keep your precepts and decrees,
for all my ways are before you.
NRSVCE.169:
Let my cry come before you, O LORD;
give me understanding according to your word.
NRSVCE.170:
Let my supplication come before you;
deliver me according to your promise.
NRSVCE.171:
My lips will pour forth praise,
because you teach me your statutes.
NRSVCE.172:
My tongue will sing of your promise,
for all your commandments are right.
NRSVCE.173:
Let your hand be ready to help me,
for I have chosen your precepts.
NRSVCE.174:
I long for your salvation, O LORD,
and your law is my delight.
NRSVCE.175:
Let me live that I may praise you,
and let your ordinances help me.
NRSVCE.176:
I have gone astray like a lost sheep; seek out your servant,
for I do not forget your commandments.

NET.1: א (Alef) How blessed are those whose actions are blameless, who obey the law of the LORD.
NET.2: How blessed are those who observe his rules, and seek him with all their heart,
NET.3: who, moreover, do no wrong, but follow in his footsteps.
NET.4: You demand that your precepts be carefully kept.
NET.5: If only I were predisposed to keep your statutes!
NET.6: Then I would not be ashamed, if I were focused on all your commands.
NET.7: I will give you sincere thanks, when I learn your just regulations.
NET.8: I will keep your statutes. Do not completely abandon me! ב (Bet)
NET.9: How can a young person maintain a pure life? By guarding it according to your instructions!
NET.10: With all my heart I seek you. Do not allow me to stray from your commands!
NET.11: In my heart I store up your words, so I might not sin against you.
NET.12: You deserve praise, O LORD! Teach me your statutes!
NET.13: With my lips I proclaim all the regulations you have revealed.
NET.14: I rejoice in the lifestyle prescribed by your rules as if they were riches of all kinds.
NET.15: I will meditate on your precepts and focus on your behavior.
NET.16: I find delight in your statutes; I do not forget your instructions. ג (Gimel)
NET.17: Be kind to your servant! Then I will live and keep your instructions.
NET.18: Open my eyes so I can truly see the marvelous things in your law!
NET.19: I am like a foreigner in this land. Do not hide your commands from me!
NET.20: I desperately long to know your regulations at all times.
NET.21: You reprimand arrogant people. Those who stray from your commands are doomed.
NET.22: Spare me shame and humiliation, for I observe your rules.
NET.23: Though rulers plot and slander me, your servant meditates on your statutes.
NET.24: Yes, I find delight in your rules; they give me guidance. ד (Dalet)
NET.25: I collapse in the dirt. Revive me with your word!
NET.26: I told you about my ways and you answered me. Teach me your statutes!
NET.27: Help me to understand what your precepts mean! Then I can meditate on your marvelous teachings.
NET.28: I collapse from grief. Sustain me by your word!
NET.29: Remove me from the path of deceit! Graciously give me your law!
NET.30: I choose the path of faithfulness; I am committed to your regulations.
NET.31: I hold fast to your rules. O LORD, do not let me be ashamed!
NET.32: I run along the path of your commands, for you enable me to do so. ה (He)
NET.33: Teach me, O LORD, the lifestyle prescribed by your statutes, so that I might observe it continually.
NET.34: Give me understanding so that I might observe your law, and keep it with all my heart.
NET.35: Guide me in the path of your commands, for I delight to walk in it.
NET.36: Give me a desire for your rules, rather than for wealth gained unjustly.
NET.37: Turn my eyes away from what is worthless! Revive me with your word!
NET.38: Confirm to your servant your promise, which you made to the one who honors you.
NET.39: Take away the insults that I dread! Indeed, your regulations are good.
NET.40: Look, I long for your precepts. Revive me with your deliverance! ו (Vav)
NET.41: May I experience your loyal love, O LORD, and your deliverance, as you promised.
NET.42: Then I will have a reply for the one who insults me, for I trust in your word.
NET.43: Do not completely deprive me of a truthful testimony, for I await your justice.
NET.44: Then I will keep your law continually now and for all time.
NET.45: I will be secure, for I seek your precepts.
NET.46: I will speak about your regulations before kings and not be ashamed.
NET.47: I will find delight in your commands, which I love.
NET.48: I will lift my hands to your commands, which I love, and I will meditate on your statutes. ז (Zayin)
NET.49: Remember your word to your servant, for you have given me hope.
NET.50: This is what comforts me in my trouble, for your promise revives me.
NET.51: Arrogant people do nothing but scoff at me. Yet I do not turn aside from your law.
NET.52: I remember your ancient regulations, O LORD, and console myself.
NET.53: Rage takes hold of me because of the wicked, those who reject your law.
NET.54: Your statutes have been my songs in the house where I live.
NET.55: I remember your name during the night, O LORD, and I will keep your law.
NET.56: This has been my practice, for I observe your precepts. ח (Khet)
NET.57: The LORD is my source of security. I have determined to follow your instructions.
NET.58: I seek your favor with all my heart. Have mercy on me as you promised!
NET.59: I consider my actions and follow your rules.
NET.60: I keep your commands eagerly and without delay.
NET.61: The ropes of the wicked tighten around me, but I do not forget your law.
NET.62: In the middle of the night I arise to thank you for your just regulations.
NET.63: I am a friend to all your loyal followers, and to those who keep your precepts.
NET.64: O LORD, your loyal love fills the earth. Teach me your statutes! ט (Tet)
NET.65: You are good to your servant, O LORD, just as you promised.
NET.66: Teach me proper discernment and understanding! For I consider your commands to be reliable.
NET.67: Before I was afflicted I used to stray off, but now I keep your instructions.
NET.68: You are good and you do good. Teach me your statutes!
NET.69: Arrogant people smear my reputation with lies, but I observe your precepts with all my heart.
NET.70: Their hearts are calloused, but I find delight in your law.
NET.71: It was good for me to suffer, so that I might learn your statutes.
NET.72: The law you have revealed is more important to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver. י (Yod)
NET.73: Your hands made me and formed me. Give me understanding so that I might learn your commands.
NET.74: Your loyal followers will be glad when they see me, for I find hope in your word.
NET.75: I know, LORD, that your regulations are just. You disciplined me because of your faithful devotion to me.
NET.76: May your loyal love console me, as you promised your servant.
NET.77: May I experience your compassion, so I might live! For I find delight in your law.
NET.78: May the arrogant be humiliated, for they have slandered me! But I meditate on your precepts.
NET.79: May your loyal followers turn to me, those who know your rules.
NET.80: May I be fully committed to your statutes, so that I might not be ashamed. כ (Kaf)
NET.81: I desperately long for your deliverance. I find hope in your word.
NET.82: My eyes grow tired as I wait for your promise to be fulfilled. I say, “When will you comfort me?”
NET.83: For I am like a wineskin dried up in smoke. I do not forget your statutes.
NET.84: How long must your servant endure this? When will you judge those who pursue me?
NET.85: The arrogant dig pits to trap me, which violates your law.
NET.86: All your commands are reliable. I am pursued without reason. Help me!
NET.87: They have almost destroyed me here on the earth, but I do not reject your precepts.
NET.88: Revive me with your loyal love, that I might keep the rules you have revealed. ל (Lamed)
NET.89: O LORD, your instructions endure; they stand secure in heaven.
NET.90: You demonstrate your faithfulness to all generations. You established the earth and it stood firm.
NET.91: Today they stand firm by your decrees, for all things are your servants.
NET.92: If I had not found encouragement in your law, I would have died in my sorrow.
NET.93: I will never forget your precepts, for by them you have revived me.
NET.94: I belong to you. Deliver me! For I seek your precepts.
NET.95: The wicked prepare to kill me, yet I concentrate on your rules.
NET.96: I realize that everything has its limits, but your commands are beyond full comprehension. מ (Mem)
NET.97: O how I love your law! All day long I meditate on it.
NET.98: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for I am always aware of them.
NET.99: I have more insight than all my teachers, for I meditate on your rules.
NET.100: I am more discerning than those older than I, for I observe your precepts.
NET.101: I stay away from the evil path, so that I might keep your instructions.
NET.102: I do not turn aside from your regulations, for you teach me.
NET.103: Your words are sweeter in my mouth than honey!
NET.104: Your precepts give me discernment. Therefore I hate all deceitful actions. נ (Nun)
NET.105: Your word is a lamp to walk by, and a light to illumine my path.
NET.106: I have vowed and solemnly sworn to keep your just regulations.
NET.107: I am suffering terribly. O LORD, revive me with your word!
NET.108: O LORD, please accept the freewill offerings of my praise! Teach me your regulations!
NET.109: My life is in continual danger, but I do not forget your law.
NET.110: The wicked lay a trap for me, but I do not wander from your precepts.
NET.111: I claim your rules as my permanent possession, for they give me joy.
NET.112: I am determined to obey your statutes at all times, to the very end. ס (Samek) ֹ119:113 I hate people with divided loyalties, but I love your law.
NET.114: You are my hiding place and my shield. I find hope in your word.
NET.115: Turn away from me, you evil men, so that I can observe the commands of my God.
NET.116: Sustain me as you promised, so that I will live. Do not disappoint me!
NET.117: Support me, so that I will be delivered. Then I will focus on your statutes continually.
NET.118: You despise all who stray from your statutes, for they are deceptive and unreliable.
NET.119: You remove all the wicked of the earth like slag. Therefore I love your rules.
NET.120: My body trembles because I fear you; I am afraid of your judgments. ע (Ayin)
NET.121: I do what is fair and right. Do not abandon me to my oppressors!
NET.122: Guarantee the welfare of your servant! Do not let the arrogant oppress me!
NET.123: My eyes grow tired as I wait for your deliverance, for your reliable promise to be fulfilled.
NET.124: Show your servant your loyal love! Teach me your statutes!
NET.125: I am your servant. Give me insight, so that I can understand your rules.
NET.126: It is time for the LORD to act — they break your law!
NET.127: For this reason I love your commands more than gold, even purest gold.
NET.128: For this reason I carefully follow all your precepts. I hate all deceitful actions. פ (Pe)
NET.129: Your rules are marvelous. Therefore I observe them.
NET.130: Your instructions are a doorway through which light shines. They give insight to the untrained.
NET.131: I open my mouth and pant, because I long for your commands.
NET.132: Turn toward me and extend mercy to me, as you typically do to your loyal followers.
NET.133: Direct my steps by your word! Do not let any sin dominate me!
NET.134: Deliver me from oppressive men, so that I can keep your precepts.
NET.135: Smile on your servant! Teach me your statutes!
NET.136: Tears stream down from my eyes, because people do not keep your law. צ (Tsade)
NET.137: You are just, O LORD, and your judgments are fair.
NET.138: The rules you impose are just, and absolutely reliable.
NET.139: My zeal consumes me, for my enemies forget your instructions.
NET.140: Your word is absolutely pure, and your servant loves it!
NET.141: I am insignificant and despised, yet I do not forget your precepts.
NET.142: Your justice endures, and your law is reliable.
NET.143: Distress and hardship confront me, yet I find delight in your commands.
NET.144: Your rules remain just. Give me insight so that I can live. ק (Qof)
NET.145: I cried out with all my heart, “Answer me, O LORD! I will observe your statutes.”
NET.146: I cried out to you, “Deliver me, so that I can keep your rules.”
NET.147: I am up before dawn crying for help. I find hope in your word.
NET.148: My eyes anticipate the nighttime hours, so that I can meditate on your word.
NET.149: Listen to me because of your loyal love! O LORD, revive me, as you typically do!
NET.150: Those who are eager to do wrong draw near; they are far from your law.
NET.151: You are near, O LORD, and all your commands are reliable.
NET.152: I learned long ago that you ordained your rules to last. ר (Resh)
NET.153: See my pain and rescue me! For I do not forget your law.
NET.154: Fight for me and defend me! Revive me with your word!
NET.155: The wicked have no chance for deliverance, for they do not seek your statutes.
NET.156: Your compassion is great, O LORD. Revive me, as you typically do!
NET.157: The enemies who chase me are numerous. Yet I do not turn aside from your rules.
NET.158: I take note of the treacherous and despise them, because they do not keep your instructions.
NET.159: See how I love your precepts! O LORD, revive me with your loyal love!
NET.160: Your instructions are totally reliable; all your just regulations endure. שׂ/שׁ (Sin/Shin)
NET.161: Rulers pursue me for no reason, yet I am more afraid of disobeying your instructions.
NET.162: I rejoice in your instructions, like one who finds much plunder.
NET.163: I hate and despise deceit; I love your law.
NET.164: Seven times a day I praise you because of your just regulations.
NET.165: Those who love your law are completely secure; nothing causes them to stumble.
NET.166: I hope for your deliverance, O LORD, and I obey your commands.
NET.167: I keep your rules; I love them greatly.
NET.168: I keep your precepts and rules, for you are aware of everything I do. ת (Tav)
NET.169: Listen to my cry for help, O LORD! Give me insight by your word!
NET.170: Listen to my appeal for mercy! Deliver me, as you promised.
NET.171: May praise flow freely from my lips, for you teach me your statutes.
NET.172: May my tongue sing about your instructions, for all your commands are just.
NET.173: May your hand help me, for I choose to obey your precepts.
NET.174: I long for your deliverance, O LORD; I find delight in your law.
NET.175: May I live and praise you! May your regulations help me!
NET.176: I have wandered off like a lost sheep. Come looking for your servant, for I do not forget your commands.
